name: activepieces
description: Reach 280+ open-source integrations ("pieces") as tools through a self-hosted Activepieces MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Reach 280+ open-source integrations ("pieces") as tools through a self-hosted Activepieces MCP server.
interface.longDescription: Use Activepieces to invoke prebuilt integrations and flows instead of wiring each API by hand.
